title: Per-profile Syften filter partition
description: profiles/<profile>/knowledge/syften-filters.json. The Syften account itself is shared across every profile (one subscription, one filter set — agent/mcp_config.py's build_mcp_servers takes a profile argument but does not scope connector credentials by it). This file declares which of that ONE account's filters belong to THIS tenant, plus their bucket labels, so gtm_core.community_signal.score can partition a shared account's matches per profile. When strict=true, a match whose filter is not a key of filters{} is dropped (counted in totals.dropped_off_tenant) instead of bucketed as (filter, 'other') — so another tenant's Syften noise can never reach this tenant's dashboard, even though the account returns it. Populate filters{} from mcp__syften__syften_get_filters, keeping only the strings this tenant owns.

strict.description: When true, matches whose filter is not a key of filters{} are dropped before scoring. Leave false until filters{} is populated — strict=true with an empty filters{} would drop every match.

notes.description: Free-text operator note — e.g. when this was last synced against the Syften dashboard.

filters.description: Exact Syften filter string -> bucket label. One entry per filter this tenant owns.

entity.description: Display name, e.g. a competitor or product.

category.description: Short, stable category key, e.g. 'identity' or 'gateway'.
